name: drax
description: Organic automation runtime for founders with an existing product.

interface.shortDescription: Turn a product into a daily organic automation system.
interface.longDescription: Drax interviews founders with an existing product, defines language and stack/security decisions, creates a 90-post plan, prepares article, SVG, video, and metadata assets, and operates a measured organic automation loop with clock/manual triggers and explicit approval gates.
defaultPrompt: Use Drax to design my organic growth system.
Turn my product knowledge into an editorial calendar.
